title: Mindspright Legal acts on Adisoft Technologies IPO
description: Adisoft Technologies Limited has made an Initial Public Offering of 43,08,000 Equity Shares aggregating up-to ₹74.10 crore.Mindspright Legal advised Adisoft Technologies on this IPO.The transaction team was led by Richa Bhansali (Partner), with support from Mayuri Thakkar (Principal Associate), Associates Sujata Kumari, Mansi Khot and Saksham Bhatnagar.Richa BhansaliPune-based Adisoft Technologies is an automation solutions provider for automotive & non-automotive industry.
